title: Lighter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''lighter''' was a class of small [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that was commonly used in various [[Navy/Legends|navies]] throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], including those of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

Essentially a militarized [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] designed for short trips, lighters were put to a variety of uses, especially as personal vehicles for use by higher-ranking officers. Generally capable of carrying only a few passengers and small amounts of cargo, they were named for ancient water-faring vessels that were used to lighten the burden of larger such surface ships.<ref name="medstar1">''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''</ref>

Included among such classes put to this use was the [[Conqueror-class assault ship|''Conqueror''-class assault ship]]; one such vessel was used by [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Tarnese Bleyd]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="medstar1" /> While he oversaw the construction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] made use of a lighter as his personal transport, as did Admiral [[Conan Antonio Motti/Legends|Conan Antonio Motti]].<ref name="dsn">[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]</ref>

In some cases, such as with the [[Etti Lighter]] used by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], they were pressed into service as frontline combat vessels, but in common parlance they were still classified as lighters.<ref name="hssa">''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]''</ref> [[Kyle Katarn]]'s ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'', an [[HWK-290 light freighter/Legends|HWK-290]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]],<ref name="dfs">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050407a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 1}}</ref> was sometimes described as a lighter.<ref name="dfse">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>
